progress.durable_improvement: Added an independent read-only GitHub Actions gate that audits the committed Cloudflare deployment workflow whenever the workflow or audit implementation changes.
progress.verification: 3 deterministic contract tests passed; gate_contract_satisfied. No hosted workflow run was observed for the latest source commit at inspection time.
security_boundary: JSON audit artifact retained for later hosted-run inspection

blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values and a successful deployment-workflow dispatch before hostname, served surface, and deployed commit can be proven.
next_action: Inspect the first hosted security-gate run and its JSON artifact; then verify exact upstream action commit identities and pin action references where policy permits. After credentials are configured, dispatch the deployment workflow and validate URL, control-plane metadata, served identity, proof, signature, freshness, and acceptance artifacts.
